name: tic-analyzer
description: TIC Analyzer — Motor local de análise para projetos grandes

scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:server: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && npm run copy:grammars && node dist/src/server/index.js
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:server
scripts.verify: npm run build:server && node scripts/verify-semantic.mjs && node scripts/verify-store.mjs && node scripts/verify-crosstier.mjs && node scripts/verify-orm.mjs && node scripts/verify-impact.mjs && node scripts/verify-graph-insights.mjs && node scripts/verify-export.mjs && node scripts/verify-communities.mjs && node scripts/verify-health.mjs && node scripts/verify-pr-review.mjs && node scripts/verify-serve.mjs && node scripts/verify-governance.mjs && node scripts/verify-living.mjs && node scripts/verify-value.mjs && node scripts/verify-portfolio.mjs && node scripts/verify-incremental.mjs && node scripts/verify-ux.mjs && node scripts/verify-embeddings.mjs && node scripts/verify-git-history.mjs && node scripts/verify-ast-metrics.mjs && node scripts/verify-eventbus.mjs && node scripts/verify-github-client.mjs && node scripts/verify-memory-archive.mjs && node scripts/verify-agents.mjs && node scripts/verify-meetings.mjs && node scripts/verify-criticality.mjs
